# InkZ

> Ink, but components know their size

A terminal UI framework for React with two-phase rendering

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Getting Started](/inkz/guide/getting-started.md)
- [Installation](/inkz/guide/installation.md)
- [Why InkZ?](/inkz/guide/why-inkz.md)

- [Components](/inkz/guide/components.md)
- [Hooks](/inkz/guide/hooks.md)
- [Scrolling](/inkz/guide/scrolling.md)

### Migration

- [Migration from Ink](/inkz/guide/migration.md)

### Components

- [Box](/inkz/api/box.md)
- [Text](/inkz/api/text.md)
- [Newline](/inkz/api/newline.md)
- [Spacer](/inkz/api/spacer.md)
- [Static](/inkz/api/static.md)

- [useLayout](/inkz/api/use-layout.md)
- [useInput](/inkz/api/use-input.md)
- [useApp](/inkz/api/use-app.md)
- [useStdout](/inkz/api/use-stdout.md)
